data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the geofencing requirement.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the geofencing feature, specifically that users must be within a certain distance of the job site to clock in. However, the evidence provided does not include any API reads or state checks that confirm this functionality. The previous exploratory step (uc-need-validate-1) was also blocked due to a lack of evidence regarding mobile clock-in/clock-out functionality with GPS location capture, indicating a broader issue with the available data.
gaps: No evidence of geofencing functionality to ensure users are within X feet of the job site to clock in.
